evals.prompt: Dogfood http://localhost:3000 and find UX issues on the checkout flow
evals.expected_output: Structured report with reproduction steps and screenshots for checkout bugs

evals.prompt: Explore vercel.com and document any broken links or console errors
evals.expected_output: Issue list with annotated screenshots and console log excerpts

evals.prompt: QA test the login flow including error states and edge cases
evals.expected_output: Report covering valid login, invalid credentials, empty fields, and session handling
